basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat
basic_details.short_information: The Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT Surat) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates who meet the age criteria specified in the official notification and hold a B.E./ B.Tech. and/ or M.E./ M.Tech./ MS (Research) in the relevant disciplines with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA and a valid GATE/ NET or equivalent qualification can submit their applications through Email on or before 30 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Women candidates will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech. and/ or M.E./ M.Tech./MS (Research) in Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Electronics & Communication Engineering, or related disciplines with Minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA and GATE/ NET or equivalent examination qualification
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. and/or M.E./M.Tech./MS (Research) in Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Electronics & Communication Engineering, or related disciplines. Minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA. GATE/NET or equivalent examination qualification.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA as per ANRF/GoI norms

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT Surat JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at SVNIT Surat is 30th July 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech. and/or M.E./M.Tech./MS (Research) in relevant fields like Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or Electronics & Communication Engineering, with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. Is GATE/NET qualification mandatory for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Yes, a qualification in GATE/NET or an equivalent examination is mandatory for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at SVNIT Surat.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA as per ANRF/GoI norms.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the SVNIT Surat JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the JRF post are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all required documents and send it to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in this recruitment drive by SVNIT Surat.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at SVNIT Surat will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Does SVNIT Surat offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, relaxation in the upper age limit will be provided for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Women candidates as per the prevailing Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
